<!--
Use a Conventional Commit-style PR title (feat:/fix:/docs:/refactor:/chore:…) —
the release version and changelog are generated from it.
-->

## What

Briefly, what does this change do?

## Why

The motivation / the problem it solves.

## Checklist

- [ ] `stack check` passes locally (format + lint + test)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or schema changed
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
